description.value:
At 11th level, the force of your strikes has increased so much to the point that victims of your barrages cannot help but be astonished at their power. When a creature suffering from 5 ranks of Bruised or the condition that corresponds with the nature release you gained from this clan would gain another rank of the condition, they instead become Thunderstruck, losing all ranks of that condition and instead gaining 1 rank of Thunderstuck. Such a creature suffers the following effects:

  • A creature that is Thunderstruck is counted as under the effects of the condition that caused them to gain this condition for the purposes of interacting with jutsu, features, and traits, and cannot gain ranks of that condition while Thunderstruck.
  • A creature that is Thunderstruck takes an additional 10 damage when they would be damaged, twice per turn.
  • A creature that is Thunderstruck cannot take the Dash, Dodge, or Disengage actions, and cannot cast jutsu as Bonus Actions.
  • A creature that is Thunderstruck cannot make more than one attack with the Attack action, reduces the amount of attacks they can make with jutsu they cast by half, and cannot cause saving throws they force to be made at disadvantage.
Note:

Thunderstruck creatures can still acquire ranks of other conditions that correspond with other nature releases, the only exception is the condition that initially caused them to become Thunderstruck.
